description:
Returns the owner of the first rope - the transport to which other entities are attached with [[ropes]]. This command is the opposite of [[ropeAttachedObjects]]. To return all owners see [[ropesAttachedTo]].

[[File:ropeAttachedTo.jpg|400px]]
name: ropeAttachedTo

ret.desc: a transport from which the first rope originates, the rope owner

Item.desc: entity attached to the end of the first rope
Item.name: cargo
